title: Vilfa plebeia
intro: Vilfa plebeia, also known as Vilfa grass, is a type of herbaceous plant belonging to the family Poaceae. It is valued for its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis. The bioactive constituents of Vilfa plebeia include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional medicine, Vilfa plebeia is commonly used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being incorporated into salves and creams for topical application.
